title: Are You a Landmine, Chihara-san?
titleRomaji: Jirai nan desu ka? Chihara-san
titleNative: 地雷なんですか？地原さん
synonyms: That Girl Is Cute... But Dangerous?
synopsis: It’s the start of a new semester, and high school junior Kuroki finds himself seated beside the girl everyone whispers about: Mai Chihara. With her gothic fashion, jet-black hair, and intense stare, Chihara is said to be a “landmine” girl or jirai-kei, the hyper-feminine, dark aesthetic often associated with yandere tendencies and unstable personalities. But when Kuroki accidentally draws Chihara’s attention, he discovers she isn’t nearly as unstable as people claim. Beneath the intimidating aura is a surprisingly sweet girl… if a little weird. Hesitantly, Kuroki begins to learn more about Chihara and her strange quirks. Is there more to her than her volatile reputation? Or is all the dark clothing just a red flag in disguise? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: The War of Greedy Witches
titleRomaji: Majo Taisen: 32-nin no Isai no Majo wa Koroshiau
titleNative: 魔女大戦 32人の異才の魔女は殺し合う
synonyms: มหาสงคราม 32 แม่มด
Witches war: La gran guerra entre brujas
synopsis: Joan of Arc, the hero who saved France, was sentenced to be burned at the stake. But at the moment of her death, a demon sent her to another world. There, she found 32 women from across history, known as “witches.” With the addition of the final witch, Joan of Arc, Walpurgis Night begins: Only one witch can survive, and have her wish granted! (Source: Comikey)

title: Ending Maker
titleRomaji: Ending Maker
titleNative: 엔딩메이커
synonyms: エンディングメーカー
synopsis: After "outboxer009" wakes up in the body of Jude Bayer from Legend of Heroes 2, he soon discovers that his rival "sandstorm" has also entered the game world as Cordelia Chace. These top-two-ranked old pros come to realize that navigating this game world is much harder than just pointing and clicking. With the apocalyptic conclusion of the game looming before them, they'll have to combine his quick wit, her foul mouth, and both their gamer mindsets to make a new, less cataclysmic ending. (Source: Tapas, edited)

titleRomaji: Akuyaku no Goreisoku no Dounika shitai Nichijou
titleNative: 悪役のご令息のどうにかしたい日常
synonyms: 反派小少爷千方百计想要改变的日常
The Duke's Beloved Third Son Aims to Escape as a Villain!?
악역 영식의 어떻게든 하고 싶은 일상
synopsis: ♪ A loose and fluffy isekai reincarnation fantasy where the villain's son does his best to avoid ruin ♪ When I was selfish and laughing loudly, I (6 years old) remembered my previous life. Is this the world of RPGs? Moreover, I am the weakest of the three brothers, defeated by the heroes of the future, the so called "villain". I'm so unlucky. It's terrible. Confused, depressed, and worried, I made up my mind. First of all, let's stop being a villain! Be a good boy, get along with your beloved brothers and servants, and defeat the death flag! (Source: Ichijinsha, translated)

synonyms: This is the Police Station in Front of Kameari Park in Katsushika Ward
Kochikame: Aquí la comisaría de enfrente del parque Kameari, distrito de Katsushika
synopsis: The typical Kochikame plot involves Ryo-san coming up with a money-making scheme by inventing a new gadget or capitalizing on a fad, achieving great success, calling on Nakagawa's help as things turn sour, and finally losing it all as the fad runs out of steam or out of control. While the plots are gag-driven, much of the humor comes from the juxtaposition of mundane characters with the bizarrely incongruous (Nakagawa's wealth, Maria's appeal, everyone's lack of actual police work), most of which is never explained or rationalized in the slightest. (Source: Wikipedia) Notes: -Volume 201 got published on October 4, 2021. -Included one-shot: Robot Santapei.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen 0
titleRomaji: Jujutsu Kaisen 0: Tokyo Toritsu Jujutsu Koutou Senmon Gakkou
titleNative: 呪術廻戦 0 東京都立呪術高等専門学校
synopsis: Yuta Okkotsu is a nervous high school student who is suffering from a serious problem—his childhood friend Rika has turned into a curse and won't leave him alone. Since Rika is no ordinary curse, his plight is noticed by Satoru Gojo, a teacher at Jujutsu High, a school where fledgling exorcists learn how to combat curses. Gojo convinces Yuta to enroll, but can he learn enough in time to confront the curse that haunts him? (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Guuzou Jihen: Hato ni Himei wa Kikoenai
titleRomaji: Guuzou Jihen: Hato ni Himei wa Kikoenai
titleNative: 偶像事変~鳩に悲鳴は聞こえない~
synonyms: 偶像事變 ～鴿子聽不見悲鳴～
synopsis: Hiiragi Sera, the most popular idol in Japan, was seriously injured during a live performance, losing one of her legs to an explosive device. The whole country was outraged by the news. Because of the manner and brutality of the attack, everyone suspected Hitoya Ittaka, a boy who was caught several years earlier, when he was just 13, for a series of bombings that killed several hundred people. As the fans' "love" for Sera turns into "hatred," Japan itself is changed...... But what is the truth? (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Akuyaku Reijou no Taida na Tameiki
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou no Taida na Tameiki
titleNative: 悪役令嬢の怠惰な溜め息
synopsis: I was reincarnated as a villainess from an otome game I was playing. At this rate, I'll be exiled for being in the heroine’s way of conquering love. However, in this world… there are no entertainment materials! No doujinshis, no otome games, no smartphone! I'm really bored! Of course, I should be avoiding the destructive bad end… but before that I’m going to die from boredom! "If there's no entertainment, just create it!" Using the knowledge from my past life to create toys and romance novels, I'll make this boring world fun! After becoming the queen’s favorite entrepreneur, I thought this scenario change will bring me to my wonderful future… .but now the novel I wrote has brought me to the destruction flag--!?

title: My Isekai Life: I Gained a Second Character Class and Became the Strongest Sage in the World!
titleRomaji: Tensei Kenja no Isekai Life: Daini no Shokugyo wo Ete, Sekai Saikyou ni Narimashita
titleEnglish: My Isekai Life: I Gained a Second Character Class and Became the Strongest Sage in the World!
titleNative: 転生賢者の異世界ライフ ～第二の職業を得て、世界最強になりました～
synonyms: Tensei Kenja no Isekai Life: Dai-2 no Shokugyo wo Ete, Sekai Saikyou ni Narimashita
Mein Isekai-Leben – Mit der Hilfe von Schleimen zum mächtigsten Magier einer anderen Welt
เกิดใหม่ในต่างโลกเป็นปราชญ์แกร่งสุดโดยไม่รู้ตัว
Life as a Reincarnated Sage in Another World ~Gaining a Second Profession and Becoming the Strongest in the World~
synopsis: Whether at the office or at home, corporate drone Yuji Sano works all the time. So when his home PC flashes a message about him being summoned to another world, Yuji restarts his machine...only to find that he's inadvertently accepted the summons! Now in a fantasy world far removed from paperwork and computers, Yuji has just one thing on his mind: waking up from what he thinks is a dream and getting back to the mountain of work he left behind! But this other world has other plans for Yuji, who quickly discovers his Monster Tamer character class allows him to befriend slimes! And thanks to their number, those slimes help him absorb so much magical knowledge that he gains a second character class in the blink of an eye! How will Yuji wield his power now that he's the greatest sage the realm has ever known?! And what about all that paperwork?! (Source: Square Enix)

title: NINE PEAKS
titleRomaji: NINE PEAKS
titleNative: NINE PEAKS
synopsis: Gaku Mashio was a first-year high school student who lived with his father. He lost his father in a sudden accident, just as he got suspended from school after getting into a fight. On the night of his father's wake, Gaku went fishing on the shore in memory of his father, but he fell into the sea and was returned 22 years into the past. Gaku's father, Harumi, who was the same age as Gaku at that time, saved him from the water. Harumi's parents (Gaku's grandparents) took a liking to Gaku, and accepted him into their family under the name Gaku Miyagi. His grandparents even encouraged him to go to Seiha High School, same as his father. Twenty-two years ago, the town of Kurei was full of delinquents. Now Gaku and his father will fight their way to the top of the town! (Source: Shonen Champion, translated)

title: Hitorigurashi, Netsu wo Dasu. Koi wo Shiru.
titleRomaji: Hitorigurashi, Netsu wo Dasu. Koi wo Shiru.
titleNative: 一人暮らし、熱を出す。恋を知る。
synonyms: Living Alone, Get A Fever. Fall In Love.
synopsis: Inoue Takashi is all alone and sick on Christmas day, when a mysterious blonde-haired woman came over to look after him. Too sick to think clearly, he couldn't help but let her pamper him. A heart-warming story of secret love!
